What is BONK?

Initially launched as a free airdrop to the Solana community on Christmas Day 2022, BONK's adoption has since grown parabolically to emerge as the true community coin of web3

The platform helps investors to make easy to purchase and sell their tokens

Roadmap

The use of cryptocurrencies has become more widespread, The origin platform idea.
Development of the concept and business plan.

2022 Q1
Concept

  • Concept Generation

  • Team Assemble

2022 Q2
Research

  • Proving the concept can work

  • Strategic Plan

  • White paper conpletion

2022 Q3
Design

  • Platform design and technical de monstration

  • Building the MVP

2023 Q1
Pre-Sale

  • Public financing & Seed funding raised

2023 Q2
App Beta Test

  • Private closed beta

  • Open beta launched to public and improvement the app

2023 Q3
Token Sale

  • ICO Press Tour

  • Open global sales of ICOblock token

2023 Q4
Alpha Test

  • In-house testing of functional

  • Prototype published and linked to Ethereum blockchain with real-time scanning

ICO Token Details

Join the industry leaders to discuss where the markets are heading. We accept token payments.

  • Start

    Aug 8, 2021 (9:00AM GMT)

  • End

    Feb 10, 2022 (9:00AM GMT)

  • Number of Tokens for Sale

    1.000.000 Tokens

  • Tokens exchange rate

    1 ETH = 650 ICC, 1 BTC = 1940 ICC

  • Minimal Transaction

    10 Tokens / Transaction

  • Acceptable curencies

    ETH, BTC, LTC
